meaning: Mountains亚平宁山脉[意大利](纵贯全国,是阿尔卑斯山脉主干南伸部分)
examples: The capital of emilia-romagna; located in northern italy east of the apennine s.
L’Aquila, high up in the Apennine mountains that form the backbone of Italy, was a few miles from the epicentre.
Huygens is the tallest lunar mountain — about the same height as Everest — and is part of the nearside Apennine mountain range.
It is here that the Apennine Mountains drop a thousand feet straight down into the turquoise Ligurian Sea .
Set in the Apennine mountains, the Geopark offers rich geological diversity and outstanding sites of mountainous landscapes, cave formations and coastal features.
